examples.title: RSA Key Generation
examples.description: Simplified steps for RSA key pair creation
examples.code:
1. Choose primes p, q
2. Compute n = p*q
3. Compute φ(n) = (p-1)*(q-1)
4. Choose e where 1 < e < φ(n), coprime
5. Compute d ≡ e⁻¹ mod φ(n)
Public Key = (e, n)
Private Key = (d, n)
examples.explanation: Prime factorization ensures private key security
